inputs.label: Refractive Index
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the lens material (dimensionless, typically 1.3-2.0).

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the lens material (dimensionless, typically 1.3-2.0).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mercek malzemesinin kırılma indisi (boyutsuz, tipik olarak 1,3-2,0).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de réfraction du matériau de la lentille (sans dimension, généralement 1,3-2,0).
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice de refracción del material de la lente (adimensional, típicamente 1.3-2.0).

inputs.label: Radius R1
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the first lens surface. Positive for convex, negative for concave.

businessContext_i18n.en: Radius of curvature of the first lens surface. Positive for convex, negative for concave.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk lens yüzeyinin eğrilik yarıçapı. Dışbükey için pozitif, içbükey için negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Krümmungsradius der ersten Linsenoberfläche. Positiv für konvex, negativ für konkav.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rayon de courbure de la première surface de la lentille. Positif pour convexe, négatif pour concave.
businessContext_i18n.es: Radio de curvatura de la primera superficie de la lente. Positivo para convexa, negativo para cóncava.

inputs.label: Radius R2
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the second lens surface. Positive for convex, negative for concave.

businessContext_i18n.en: Radius of curvature of the second lens surface. Positive for convex, negative for concave.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci lens yüzeyinin eğrilik yarıçapı. Dışbükey için pozitif, içbükey için negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Krümmungsradius der zweiten Linsenoberfläche. Positiv für konvex, negativ für konkav.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rayon de courbure de la deuxième surface de la lentille. Positif pour convexe, négatif pour concave.
businessContext_i18n.es: Radio de curvatura de la segunda superficie de la lente. Positivo para convexo, negativo para cóncavo.

inputs.label: Center Thickness
inputs.businessContext: Center thickness of the lens along the optical axis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Center thickness of the lens along the optical axis.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lensin optik eksen boyunca merkez kalınlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Mittendicke der Linse entlang der optischen Achse.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Épaisseur au centre de la lentille le long de l'axe optique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Espesor central de la lente a lo largo del eje óptico.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
